detail.description:
You are a police officer at a small neighborhood police box.

From daily patrols to on-site investigations—
to keep the streets safe, spot criminals hiding among civilians and arrest them!

▼How to Play
・Patrol the streets.
・When you meet a resident, question them.
・Observe carefully during questioning and decide whether to arrest.
・Arrest a criminal, and they’ll vanish on the spot—off to jail!
・Sometimes serious cases occur—catch the culprit at the scene!
・The more criminals you arrest, the fas
